nasb.text: So I will turn toward you and make you fruitful and multiply you, and I will confirm My covenant with you.

esv.text: I will turn to you and make you fruitful and multiply you and will confirm my covenant with you.

cnv.text: 我眷顧你們，使你們繁衍增多，也必堅立我與你們所立的約。

ccb.text: 我要眷顾你们，使你们生养众多，也要坚守与你们所立的约。
